original_query: select o_year, sum(case when nation = 'FRANCE' then volume else 0 end) / sum(volume) as mkt_share from ( select extract(year from o_orderdate) as o_year, l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) as volume, n2.n_name as nation from part, supplier, lineitem, orders, customer, nation n1, nation n2, region where p_partkey = l_partkey and s_suppkey = l_suppkey and l_orderkey = o_orderkey and o_custkey = c_custkey and c_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey and n1.n_regionkey = r_regionkey and r_name = 'EUROPE' and s_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey and o_orderdate between date '1995-01-01' and date '1996-12-31' and p_type = 'SMALL ANODIZED TIN' ) as all_nations group by o_year order by o_year;
rewritten_query:
SELECT 
    EXTRACT(year FROM o_orderdate) AS o_year,
    SUM(CASE WHEN n2.n_name = 'FRANCE' THEN l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) ELSE 0 END) /
    SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS mkt_share
FROM 
    region
    JOIN nation n1 ON n1.n_regionkey = region.r_regionkey AND region.r_name = 'EUROPE'
    JOIN customer ON customer.c_nationkey = n1.n_nationkey
    JOIN orders ON orders.o_custkey = customer.c_custkey 
        AND orders.o_orderdate BETWEEN DATE '1995-01-01' AND DATE '1996-12-31'
    JOIN lineitem ON lineitem.l_orderkey = orders.o_orderkey
    JOIN part ON part.p_partkey = lineitem.l_partkey AND part.p_type = 'SMALL ANODIZED TIN'
    JOIN supplier ON supplier.s_suppkey = lineitem.l_suppkey
    JOIN nation n2 ON supplier.s_nationkey = n2.n_nationkey
GROUP BY 
    o_year
ORDER BY 
    o_year;

rewrite_suggestion.produced_suggestion: Eliminated unnecessary subquery by flattening the query structure
Replaced implicit joins with explicit JOIN syntax to clarify the join order and help the optimizer
Restructured the query to start with the filtered region table to potentially reduce rows early in the join sequence
